general.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while processing the command.

bug.err_owner_only: ❌ Only the creator of Sengo can use this option of the command.
bug.webhook_configured: ✅ The bug report webhook has been successfully configured.
bug.err_invalid_webhook: ❌ The provided URL is not a valid Discord webhook.
bug.err_no_webhook_set: ❌ No webhook has been configured to receive bug reports. Please contact the bot creator.
bug.err_empty_report: ❌ You cannot send an empty bug report. Please describe the bug or attach an image.
bug.report_sent: ✅ Your bug report has been sent successfully. Thank you for your help!
bug.err_send_failed: ❌ An error occurred while trying to send your report to the webhook.
bug.err_webhook_invalid: ❌ The webhook configured to receive bug reports is invalid or has been deleted. Please contact the bot creator.

sugerencia.err_owner_only: ❌ Only the creator of Sengo can use this option of the command.
sugerencia.webhook_configured: ✅ The suggestion webhook has been successfully configured.
sugerencia.err_invalid_webhook: ❌ The provided URL is not a valid Discord webhook.
sugerencia.err_no_webhook_set: ❌ No webhook has been configured to receive suggestions. Please contact the bot creator.
sugerencia.err_empty_report: ❌ You cannot send an empty suggestion. Please describe your suggestion or attach an image.
sugerencia.err_send_failed: ❌ An error occurred while trying to send your suggestion to the webhook.
sugerencia.err_webhook_invalid: ❌ The webhook configured to receive suggestions is invalid or has been deleted. Please contact the bot creator.

tips.country_redundant: 💡 *Tip: Since your country is already **{country}**, you can simply use `-country` without specifying the code and Sengo will auto-detect it.*
tips.username_redundant: 💡 *Tip: Since you are already linked to the bot, you don't need to type your username in the command; you can run it directly.*
tips.server_redundant: 💡 *Tip: The default server is Bancho, so there is no need to add `-bancho` or `-server bancho`.*
tips.mode_redundant: 💡 *Tip: Since your default game mode is standard, you don't need to add `-osu` or `-std` to the command.*

profile.title: {username}'s osu! profile
profile.not_found: User {username} was not found on osu!

language.changed: The language for this server has been set to **English**.
language.help_description:
Correct usage of the command:
`{prefix}language [es|en]` or `{prefix}idioma [es|en]`
Or use the slash commands `/language` or `/idioma`.

To see available languages, use `{prefix}language list` or `{prefix}language -list`.
language.only_guild: This command can only be used in a server.
language.no_admin: You do not have Administrator permissions to change the server language.
language.db_error: There was an error trying to update the language in the database.

about.only_author: ❌ Only the person who ran the command can use this navigation.

0.title: 🌸 About Sengo
0.description:
Sengo is a high-performance Discord bot specialized for the **osu!** community, designed with an extreme focus on speed, automation, and social integration.

Below are the advanced features that make it stand out from traditional alternatives. Use the buttons below to explore each section with details and examples of use:

1.title: 🔒 Secure OAuth 2.0
1.description:
**Secure Linking with OAuth 2.0**

Forget about changing your profile page or using tedious methods. Link your account officially in seconds with `{prefix}link -oauth`.

**Details and Usage:**
• **Auto-detection**: Upon authorizing via OAuth, Sengo automatically detects your avatar, country flag, and your **osu! Supporter** status 💖.
• **Security**: We do not need your password or sensitive data. Everything is managed through official osu! servers.
• **Support Pool**: If you have supporter, your account will safely help retrieve national rankings for the whole server.

2.title: ⚡ Latency & Cache
2.description:
**Sub-Millisecond Response Times (Cache)**

Sengo is optimized to respond instantly. When you query your recent play with `.r`, the bot initiates a background predictive process.

**Details and Usage:**
• **Smart Preload**: Preloads local cache with compare (`.c`), profile, and beatmap metadata.
• **Extreme Speed**: When running `.c` immediately after, the bot responds in **under 1ms**, avoiding redundant requests to the osu! API and eliminating wait latency.

3.title: 🗺️ National Leaderboards
3.description:
**Smart National Leaderboards**

Check who has the best score from your country on any map quickly and easily.

**Details and Usage:**
• **Command**: Use `.lb -pais` to view the national leaderboard for the map.
• **Auto-detection**: If linked via OAuth, Sengo will automatically detect your flag and nationality without needing to specify the country code (e.g. `MX`, `ES`, `VE`, `AR`).
• **Flexibility**: You can also search manually by specifying the code (e.g. `.lb -pais cl`).

4.title: 👥 Score Gap (.gap)
4.description:
**Score Gap (.gap / -friends)**

Compare and analyze how you stand against your friends and server members in the blink of an eye.

**Details and Usage:**
• **Command `.gap`**: Shows the gap and exact difference in score, accuracy, and PP of server users on the queried map.
• **Filter `-friends`**: Add the `-friends` flag to your commands (such as `.lb -friends`) to isolate the leaderboard and compete only against your osu! friends.

5.title: 🎯 Farm Recommender (.rec)
5.description:
**Smart and Personalized Recommendations (.recommend / .rec)**

Looking for maps to farm PP? Sengo analyzes your Top 100 and creates customized recommendations in real time.

**Details and Usage:**
• **Dynamic Profiling**: The bot studies your accuracy, preferred BPM, favorite mods, and mappers in your top plays.
• **Button Filters**: Instantly switch between playstyles like **Jumps**, **Streams**, **Marathons**, **Loved** maps, or **Tag Affinity**.
• **Advanced Search**: Customize your target range with flags (e.g. `s.rec -pp 250-300 -mods HDDT`).
• **User Tags**: The bot connects with osu! community tags to recommend maps with the exact patterns of your current skillset.

6.title: 🛠️ Command List
6.description:
**Other Sengo Commands**

Here is a quick guide to other essential bot commands:

• **osu! Commands**:
  ▸ `s.r` / `s.rs`: Shows your most recent play. Supports `-l` to list the last 10 and `-b` to sort by PP.
  ▸ `s.c`: Compares your score on the channel's last beatmap.
  ▸ `s.lb`: Shows the beatmap's global leaderboard.
  ▸ `s.osu`: Shows your osu! profile or another player's (supports detailed mode).
  ▸ `s.top`: Shows your top PP scores.
  ▸ `s.daily`: Shows details and ranking of the current osu! Daily Challenge.
  ▸ `s.subir`: Manually saves/uploads a score to the bot's system.
• **Utility & Community Commands**:
  ▸ `s.link`: Links your Discord account with osu!.
  ▸ `s.amigos`: Manages and audits your osu! friends list within the bot.
  ▸ `s.contribuidores`: Meet the developers and contributors behind Sengo.
  ▸ `s.sorteo`: Creates and manages advanced giveaways with role, booster, and nitro filters.
• **Fun**:
  ▸ `s.fumo`: Entertainment command with Fumo images.

help.description:
**Hello! I'm Sengo**, a high-performance Discord bot specialized in osu! and local utilities.

> Use `{prefix}help [command]` to view detailed description and usage of a specific command.
help.not_found: The command `{queryName}` does not exist. Use `{prefix}help` to view the commands list.

track.header: Manage osu! score tracking in the server.
track.body: Configure the play announcement channel or add/remove users from tracking.
track.usage:
s.track canal [#channel/desactivar]
s.track add <osu_user>
s.track remove <osu_user>
s.track list

bug.header: Report a bug to the developers.
bug.body: Sends a bug report directly to the bot creator.
bug.usage:
s.bug <text> : Sends a bug with the specified text.
The command also accepts attachments (images/photos) and message links if replying to a message.

sugerencia.header: Submit a suggestion to the developers.
sugerencia.body: Sends a suggestion or improvement idea directly to the bot creator.
sugerencia.usage:
s.sugerencia <text> : Sends a suggestion with the specified text.
The command also accepts attachments (images/photos) and message links if replying to a message.

help.header: Sengo commands, explained step by step.
help.body: Shows the complete list of commands or the details and usage of a specific command.
help.usage:
s.help          : Lists all available commands
s.help [command]: Shows detailed help for a command

language.body: Allows configuring the bot's language for the current server (Spanish or English).
language.usage:
s.language    : Shows the current language and how to change it
s.language es : Changes language to Spanish
s.language en : Changes language to English

acerca.body: Shows detailed information about Sengo and the advanced features that make it unique.

contribuidores.body: Shows the community linked via OAuth grouped by country with their supporter status.
contribuidores.usage:
s.contribuidores
s.contribuidores -force : Forces synchronization of supporter status
contribuidores.option_force_desc: Forces real-time supporter status sync for all users.

donadores.body: Those who contacted Jeiden privately to support him financially for his work on Sengo.

globo.header: Generates image with a speech bubble
globo.body: Adds a comic speech bubble on top of the attached image.

yuri.body: The creator of the bot likes reading yuri manga.

ping.body: Calculates the response time in milliseconds from Discord.

roll.body: Generates a pseudo-random integer between a minimum and maximum range.

say.body: Sends a message identical to the provided text.
say.usage: s.say 'text' : Sengo sends a message equal to the text

rol.body: Allows changing role colors, and granting or removing roles individually or in bulk.
rol.usage:
s.rol color <role_id> <hex> : Changes role color.
s.rol otorgar <role_id> <user_id> : Grants/removes the role to a user.
s.rol otorgarTodos <role_id> [otorgar|remover|ambos] : Grants or removes the role to the entire server.

star.body: Processes and highlights the message with the most unique reactions from the previous day in the configured channel, rewarding experience.
star.usage:
s.star
s.star config setFromChannel <id> : Source channel
s.star config setStarChannel <id> : Destination channel
s.star config setMsjLimit <num> : Message limit
s.star config setExpReward <num> : Experience points
s.star config setLogsChannel <id> : Logs channel

cumple.body: Allows users to register birthdays and admins to configure automatic greetings in a dedicated channel.

giveaway.body:
Allows creating, ending, and rerolling giveaways on the server.

🛡️ **Provably Fair:**
Each giveaway generates a SHA-256 hash of a secret seed when starting. When it ends, the seed is revealed. You can verify that the giveaway was not manipulated:
1. Apply SHA-256 to the revealed seed (Server Seed) and check that it matches the Validation Hash from the start.
2. Winners are chosen by sorting participants alphabetically by their ID and applying HMAC-SHA256 with the seed.
giveaway.usage:
s.giveaway create <#channel> <winners> <time> <prize>
s.giveaway end <message_id|link>
s.giveaway reroll <message_id|link>

github.body: Allows administrators to register, delete, and list channels to receive GitHub commit notifications.
github.usage:
s.github colocar [canal] : Registers a channel to receive updates (default is current channel).
s.github borrar [canal] : Stops listening to commits in the specified channel.

amigos.body: Displays the player's friends list by pages, detailing their supporter status, Sengo linking, and mutual state.
amigos.usage:
s.amigos : Displays your friends by pages.
s.amigos -sengo : Compares your friends against the users linked to the bot (OWNER only).

bg.header: Displays the high-resolution background of a beatmap
bg.body: Gets and sends the high-resolution background image of the last beatmap sent in the channel or the specified beatmap.
bg.usage:
s.bg : Sends the background of the last beatmap in the channel.
s.bg <beatmap_id> : Sends the background of a beatmap by its ID.

daily.header: Stats of the current Daily Challenge
daily.body: Shows the active Daily Challenge map, its stars, creator, the time remaining to complete it, and the current top 3 scores.

digitos.body:
Applicable for [**Osu! Latinoamerica**](https://discord.gg/4GHYpRn).
Grants a digit role based on the user linked to the bot and their main gamemode.

pais.body:
Applicable for [**Osu! Latinoamerica**](https://discord.gg/Ey2PYd4J73).
Grants a country role based on the user linked to the bot.

identidad.body:
Applicable for [**Osu! Latinoamerica**](https://discord.gg/Ey2PYd4J73).
Automatically assigns both roles (country and digits) based on your osu! account linked via OAuth.

replay.body: Upload an `.osr` file to the chat along with the `s.replay` command, or reply to a message containing the file to see its technical details.

nacional.body: Shows the leaderboard by Performance Points (pp) for a specific country in osu!.
nacional.usage:
s.nacional -pais MX : Shows the national ranking of Mexico.
s.nacional : Autodetects your country and shows its ranking.
s.nacional CL -p2 : Shows page 2 of Chile's ranking.
s.nacional -taiko : Shows the national ranking in Taiko mode.
s.nacional -acc MX : Shows Mexico's ranking sorted by accuracy (Acc).
s.nacional -regional : Shows the regional ranking for your region.
s.nacional -regional list : Shows the regions/subdivisions of your country.
s.nacional -regional Anzoategui : Shows the ranking of the Anzoátegui region.

regional.body: Shows the leaderboard by Performance Points (pp) for a specific region in osu!.
regional.usage:
s.regional : Shows your regional ranking (autodetected from osu!World).
s.regional list : Shows all the regions of your country.
s.regional Anzoategui : Shows the ranking of Anzoátegui.
s.regional -pais MX list : Shows the regions of Mexico.

link.header: Link your osu! account with the bot
link.body:
Link your Discord user with your osu! account securely and privately using OAuth.
Use the `-chat` flag if you want to link using the traditional (public) method.
link.usage:
s.link : Sends the secure linking link (OAuth) privately.
s.link -chat [osu_user] : Link your account traditionally (public).
s.link unlink : Completely unlink your account.

c.body: Compares a score on the last map fetched by Sengo. The score can belong to the command user or another player.
c.usage:
s.c : Compares the score of the user linked to the bot.
s.c 'user' : Compares the score of the user in the argument.
s.c -p 2 : Shows page 2 of the scores list.
s.c -m HD : Filters by exact mods.
s.c -g 200 : Filters by scores of 200 pp or more.
s.c -i 1 : Shows a detailed embed of the best score (similar to .rs).

entre.header: Compare general statistics between two players
entre.body: Compares general statistics (PP, Rank, Max Combo, Acc, Ranked Score, Top Play, Play Count, Play Time, Level) of two players in osu! and determines who wins the majority.

gap.body: Performs a >c across all linked users in the server, showing a paginated list sorted by score or pp.
gap.usage:
s.gap : Shows the server scores list on the last map.
s.gap -p 2 : Shows page 2 of the scores list.
s.gap -force : Forces a refresh of scores from the osu! API without using cache.
s.gap -bypass : Bypasses the server restriction and shows scores from all users linked to the bot (OWNER only).
s.gap -server <guild_id> : Shows scores from users in the specified server (OWNER only).
s.gap $reply : Does s.gap on the map from the replied message.

top.body: Shows a paginated list of a player's best plays (top) in osu! with advanced filtering.
top.usage:
s.top : Shows your best plays.
s.top -m HD : Filters by plays made exactly with HD.
s.top -mx HR : Filters by plays containing HR.
s.top -? "last goodbye" : Filters maps by title/artist/difficulty.
s.top -g 300 : Counts and shows plays with 300 pp or more.
s.top -c : Sorts by highest combo.
s.top -acc : Sorts by highest accuracy.

lb.body: Shows the best scores on the last map in the channel. Supports the `-pais [code]` flag for national rankings, dedicated mod filtering via the supporter pool, and the `-stable` / `-lazer` flags to toggle the scores version (defaults to predictive based on recent play).
lb.usage:
s.lb : Shows the global leaderboard.
s.lb -pais CL : Shows the national leaderboard of Chile.
s.lb -pais : Autodetects your country and shows its leaderboard.
s.lb -m HDHR : Shows leaderboard filtered by exact mods (HDHR).
s.lb -pais VE -m HD : Shows leaderboard of Venezuela with mod HD.
s.lb -stable : Forces the leaderboard to classic/stable style.
s.lb -lazer : Forces the leaderboard to lazer style (normalized scoring).

rs.body: Running .rs on a failed or unranked map allows it to be saved to a local database for subsequent use with .c and .gap
rs.usage:
s.rs : Get the recent play of the user linked to the bot.
s.rs -b : Sorts recent plays by PP and shows the best play.
s.rs 'user' : Get the recent play of the user in the argument.
s.rs 'user' 'mode': Get the play of the user in the argument with respect to the game mode.

osu.body: Shows the profile of a given osu! user, whether linked to the bot or specified in the argument, with a beautiful banner and option to view additional details.
osu.usage:
s.osu : Shows the profile linked to the bot.
s.osu 'osu_username' : Shows the std profile of the user in the argument.
s.osu 'osu_username' -d : Shows the complete profile with detailed stats and grades.
s.scores : Shows your detailed stats and grades directly.

map.header: Shows complete details of a beatmap
map.body: Fetches and calculates detailed statistics and PP values adjusted for mods for any beatmap.
map.usage:
s.m : Shows the last map sent in the channel.
s.m <map_id> : Shows a specific map by its ID.
s.m +HDHR : Shows stats and PP adjusted for HDHR mods.
s.m -mapset : Shows the list of difficulties for the entire mapset.

snipes.body:
Uses the page `https://snipe.huismetbenen.nl/` for this. 
Tells you how many national #1s you have, the average pp per top, most used mods, and the year you sniped the most people.
snipes.usage:
s.snipes : Gets the snipes of the user linked to the bot.
s.snipes 'user' : The snipes of the user in the argument.

mapper.body: Shows detailed mapper statistics in osu! (followers, Kudosu, ranked, loved, graveyard, guest diffs, and nominations). Also allows showing mapper leaderboards.
mapper.usage:
s.mapper : Shows your mapper statistics.
s.mapper 'osu_user' : Shows the mapper statistics of the specified user.

s.mapper -top : Shows the mapper leaderboard of the user's country (VE by default).
Flags for -top:
• -pais <código> / -country <código> : Filters the mapper leaderboard by country (e.g. MX, VE).
• -server / -servidor : Filters the leaderboard showing only linked users in the current Discord server.
• -kudosus / -gd / -ranked / -wip / -loved / -followers / -graveyard / -recent : Changes the leaderboard sorting criteria (default sorts by ranked maps).
• -std / -taiko / -ctb / -mania / -mode <modo> : Filters mappers according to their primary playmode.

s.mapper -bn : Shows the list of Beatmap Nominators (BN) from Mappers' Guild.
s.mapper -bn <user> : Shows details and preferences of a specific BN.
Flags for -bn:
• -activo / -activos / -active / -open : Filters the list to show only BNs with open requests.
• -std / -taiko / -ctb / -mania / -mode <mode> : Filters the BN list by game mode.

subir.header: Upload a score to Sengo's database.
subir.body:
Attach a `.osr` replay file or reply to a `.osr` replay or a compatible score embed (from OwO bot or Sengo) with the details of a score and it will save it to the local database.

**Options:**
`-m <mods>` or `-mods <mods>`: Overwrites the detected mods (e.g. `-m HDDT`). Use `-m NM` for No Mod.
subir.usage: s.subir [attaching .osr file or replying to a message] [-m MODS]

rework.body: Calculates how much PP a map with mods will give under the upcoming rework, shows the recalculated user profile under a rework, or their top best plays.
rework.usage:
s.rework : Compares your stats and current PP against the rework (default).
s.rework 'username' : Compares another player against the rework.
s.rework -m +HDDT : Estimates the PP of the last map with HDDT mods (or replying to a map).
s.rework -rework 198 : Calculates under a specific rework by name or ID.
s.rework -lista : Shows the reworks list.
s.rework -top : Shows your recalculated top 5.
s.rework -top 'username' : Shows another player's recalculated top 5.

ranked.header: Ranked Play details of a user
ranked.body: Shows global rank, rating (ELO), wins, played matches, and win rate of the user's Ranked Play (lazer).
ranked.usage:
s.ranked : Shows your statistics.
s.ranked 'osu_user' : Shows the statistics of the specified user.
s.ranked -top : Shows the global Ranked Play leaderboard.
s.ranked -top -wins : Shows the global leaderboard sorted by wins.
s.ranked -server : Shows the leaderboard of all linked users in the bot.
s.ranked -server 'server_id' : Shows the leaderboard of a specific server.

recommend.body:
Suggests beatmaps matching your skill and playstyle based on Sengo's local database of ranked beatmaps.

**Parameters:**
• `-pp <value or range>`: Filter by a target PP (e.g. `-pp 300` or `-pp 250-300`). Single values search within a +-10% range.
• `-mods <mods>`: Filter recommendations for specific mods (e.g. `-mods HDDT`, `-mods HR`, `-mods NM`).
• `-jugados` or `-played`: Include beatmaps you have already played in your top 100 plays (default excludes them).
• `-force` or `-forzar`: Forces fresh recommendation calculation ignoring the cache.

**Playstyles (Interactive buttons):**
• **🎯 Jumps**: Filter maps focusing on jump patterns and aim.
• **⚡ Streams**: Filter maps focusing on speed, stamina, and streams.
• **⏳ Marathons**: Recommend long maps (+5 minutes).
• **🔮 Loved**: Look for Loved/Qualified maps instead of Ranked/Approved.
• **🏷️ User Tags**: Exclusively filter maps with community tags matching your most played patterns.
recommend.usage:
s.recommend [-pp range] [-mods mod] [-played] [-force]
Examples:
- s.recommend
- s.recommend -pp 300
- s.recommend -pp 250-300 -mods HDDT
- s.recommend -played
- s.recommend -force

render.body: Sends an osu!standard replay to [o!rdr](https://ordr.issou.best/) to be rendered to video. Upload an `.osr` file with the command or reply to a message containing one. You can customize the skin and resolution with arguments.

blacklist.body: Allows administrators to block users from using Sengo globally or for specific commands.

contributors.title: 🌐 Users Linked via OAuth
contributors.syncing: ⏳ *Starting forced supporter status check for all linked users...*
contributors.empty: *There are no users linked via the secure OAuth system yet.*
contributors.error: *An unexpected error occurred while processing the command.*

yuri.stats_description: There are currently a total of **{total}** images registered by Sengo.
yuri.stats_no_data: Not enough data to generate statistics.
yuri.no_images_dir: No images available (local directory not found).

utils.roll_err_max_num: ❌ The maximum value is not a valid number.
utils.roll_err_min_num: ❌ The minimum value is not a valid number.
utils.roll_err_min_greater: ❌ The minimum value ({bottom}) cannot be greater than the maximum value ({top}).
utils.say_err_empty: ❌ You must provide the text you want me to say.

rol.only_guild: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
rol.no_admin: ❌ You do not have permissions to manage roles. You must be an `Administrator`.
rol.error_need_id: ❌ You must specify a role ID.
rol.error_no_holographic: Cannot change the color of a role if it is not holographic.
rol.error_missing_permissions: Missing permissions (my role may be lower than the specified role).
rol.color_changed_desc: The color of the role <@&{roleId}> has been successfully changed.
rol.granted_desc: The role <@&{roleId}> has been assigned to <@{userId}>.
rol.removed_desc: The role <@&{roleId}> has been removed from <@{userId}>.

starboard.invalid_channel: The specified channel is not a text channel.
starboard.only_guild: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
starboard.no_permission: ❌ You do not have permission to use this command (requires Administrator or 'Sengo' role).
starboard.err_no_from_channel: ❌ You must configure the source channel first.
starboard.err_no_star_channel: ❌ You must configure the starboard channel first.
starboard.err_no_msj_limit: ❌ You must configure the message limit first.
starboard.err_no_exp_value: ❌ You must configure the EXP reward value first.
starboard.already_sent: [{guildName} - {guildId}] A starboard message was already sent today in <#{channelId}>.
starboard.no_messages_media: ❌ No messages with images were found from the previous day.

cumple.loading: ⏳ The birthday system is initializing. Please try again in a few seconds.
cumple.err_sub_help: ❌ To view the help guide, simply use `s.cumple` (without subcommands).
cumple.only_guild: ❌ This subcommand can only be executed in a server.
cumple.err_validate_member: ❌ Could not validate your membership in the server.
cumple.err_no_permission: ❌ You do not have permissions to configure the birthday channel (requires *Manage Server* or *Administrator*).
cumple.channel_current: 📢 The current birthday announcement channel is <#{channelId}>. You can change it with `s.cumple canal #channel` or disable it with `s.cumple canal desactivar`.
cumple.channel_none: 📢 There is no birthday channel currently configured. Use `s.cumple canal #channel` to set one.
cumple.channel_disabled: ✅ Birthday announcement channel has been disabled. Sengo will no longer announce birthdays in this server.
cumple.channel_invalid: ❌ You must mention a valid channel (e.g. `#birthdays`) or provide its ID.
cumple.channel_not_found: ❌ That channel was not found in this server. Make sure Sengo has access to it.
cumple.channel_success: ✅ Birthday announcement channel has been successfully configured in <#{channelId}>.
cumple.role_current: 🎂 The current birthday role is <@&{roleId}>. You can change it with `s.cumple rol @rol` or disable it with `s.cumple rol desactivar`.
cumple.role_none: 🎂 There is no birthday role currently configured. Use `s.cumple rol @rol` to set one.
cumple.role_disabled: ✅ Birthday role assignment has been disabled. Sengo will no longer assign any role to birthday celebrants.
cumple.role_invalid: ❌ You must mention a valid role (e.g. `@Birthday`) or provide its ID.
cumple.role_not_found: ❌ That role was not found in this server.
cumple.role_err_manage_roles: ❌ Missing permissions: The bot does not have the **Manage Roles** permission in this server.

cumple.age_this_year_self: (This year you turned {age}. On your next birthday you will turn {nextAge}!)
cumple.age_this_year_other: (This year they turned {age}. On their next birthday they will turn {nextAge}!)
cumple.age_current_self: (You are currently {age} years old. On your next birthday you will turn {nextAge}!)
cumple.age_current_other: (They are currently {age} years old. On their next birthday they will turn {nextAge}!)
cumple.set_success: ✅ Birthday successfully saved: **{date}**{ageInfo}. Sengo will congratulate you on your day. 🎉
cumple.set_invalid_date: ❌ Invalid date format. Please use `DD/MM` (e.g. `15/08`) or `DD/MM/YYYY` (e.g. `15/08/2000`).
cumple.err_unrecognized: ❌ Unrecognized subcommand or date. Use `s.cumple` to see the available options.
cumple.help_msg:
🎂 **Birthday Command Guide (`s.cumple`)** 🎂

**User Commands:**
• `s.cumple [DD/MM]` or `s.cumple [DD/MM/YYYY]` : Saves or edits your birthday.
• `s.cumple set [date]` : Alternative to save your birthday.
• `s.cumple quitar` : Removes your birthday from my database.
• `s.cumple lista` : Shows all birthdays in the server grouped by month.
• `s.cumple proximo` (or `siguiente`) : Shows the closest birthday in the future.
• `s.cumple anterior` (or `pasado`) : Shows the most recent birthday in the past.

**Moderation Commands (Admin/Manage Server):**
• `s.cumple canal [#channel]` : Sets the channel where daily congratulations are sent.
• `s.cumple canal desactivar` : Disables birthday announcements in the server.
• `s.cumple rol [@role]` : Assigns a temporal role to the user during their birthday.
• `s.cumple rol desactivar` : Disables temporal birthday role assignment.
• `s.cumple actualizar` : Forces checking today's birthdays and congratulates missing ones.

**Bot Admin Commands (Owner):**
• `s.cumple añadir [@user/ID] [date]` : Registers another user's birthday.
cumple.list_no_birthdays: ✨ No birthdays registered in this server. Be the first using `.cumple set`!
cumple.next_none: No birthdays registered in the server.
cumple.next_today_desc: 🎂 Today is **{users}**'s birthday ({date})! Let's wish them a fantastic day. ✨🎁
cumple.prev_none: No birthdays registered in the server.
cumple.announce_desc: ✨ Today is {member}'s birthday! Let's wish them an excellent day full of joy and gifts. 🎂🎁🎈
cumple.announce_footer_unlinked: Sengo • Tip: Link your osu! account (.link or /vincular) to receive birthday greetings exactly at your local time! ⏰

giveaway.only_guild: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
giveaway.no_permissions: ❌ You do not have permissions to manage giveaways. Requires `Manage Messages`, `Manage Server` or `Administrator`.
giveaway.help_desc_value: Allows you to create, end, and reroll giveaways in the server.
giveaway.err_params:
❌ Insufficient parameters.
> Usage: `s.giveaway crear <#channel> [winners] <duration> <prize>`
> Example: `s.giveaway crear #giveaways 1 10m Nitro` or `s.giveaway crear #giveaways 10m Nitro`
giveaway.err_invalid_channel: ❌ Invalid channel. Make sure to mention the channel or use a valid ID.
giveaway.err_invalid_winners: ❌ The number of winners must be a positive integer.
giveaway.err_invalid_duration: ❌ Invalid duration format. Use formats like `30s`, `10m`, `2h`, `1d`.
giveaway.err_role_not_found: ❌ No role was found with ID or name "{roleInput}" in this server.
giveaway.err_provide_msg_id: ❌ You must provide a valid message ID or giveaway message link.
giveaway.err_no_active_found: ❌ No registered active giveaway was found with that message ID.
giveaway.preview_desc_intro: You are about to start the following giveaway:
giveaway.preview_footer_desc: *Use the buttons below to edit values before confirming or cancelling.*
giveaway.role_field_label: ID or Mention of Required Role
giveaway.role_field_placeholder: Leave empty if no role required
giveaway.active_desc_react: React with 🎉 to participate in the giveaway.
giveaway.fairness_validation_title:
🛡️ **Validation Hash (Fairness):**
`{hash}`
*Guarantees that the giveaway is unalterable and provably fair.*
giveaway.winners_none_offline: None (the giveaway ended while the bot was offline)
giveaway.exclusions_many: 🚫 **Exclusions by Requirements:** Excluded `{count}` participants. *(See attached text file for details)*
giveaway.ended_offline_desc: *The giveaway ended while the bot was offline. The creator can reroll to choose winners.*
giveaway.ended_text_none: 😢 The giveaway for **{prize}** ended but no one participated.
giveaway.reroll_text_winners: 🎲 **Reroll:** Congratulations to the new winners of **{prize}**: {winners}! (Rerolled from giveaway ID: `{messageId}`)
giveaway.reroll_text_none: 🎲 **Reroll:** No winners could be selected for **{prize}** because no one reacted.
giveaway.ex_no_role_higher: Does not have the required role or a higher one
giveaway.ex_no_role: Does not have the required role
giveaway.ex_has_nitro: Already has Nitro or is Booster
giveaway.offline_announcement: ⚠️ The giveaway for **{prize}** ended while the bot was offline. <@{creatorId}> has been notified to decide whether to reroll or start a new giveaway.
giveaway.dm_notification:
⚠️ **Giveaway Notification**: Your giveaway for **{prize}** (ID: `{messageId}`) ended while I was offline.
I did not automatically select winners. If you wish to choose winners from the registered participants or start a new one, you can do so with:
- To reroll (choose winners): `{prefix}sorteo reroll {messageId}`
- To create a new one: `{prefix}sorteo crear`
giveaway.err_not_ended: The giveaway is still ongoing. Use the `terminar` subcommand first.
giveaway.err_no_participants: There are not enough participants who reacted with 🎉 to reroll.
giveaway.err_no_eligible: No participant who reacted meets the giveaway requirements (role or not having osu! supporter).

amigos.err_auth_403:
❌ **Authorization Error (403):** Your osu! link does not have the necessary permission (`friends.read`) or you do not have active **osu!supporter** (required by the osu! API to query the friends list).

💡 **Solution:** Make sure you have active **osu!supporter** on your osu! account and then link your account with `s.link -oauth` authorizing all requested permissions.

amigos.list_legend:

• **Sengo**: Linked account to Sengo.

link.oauth_desc:
To link your osu! account completely securely and privately via the official API (OAuth), click the button below:

👉 **[Authorize osu! Account]({url})**

**Why use OAuth?**
• **Security**: We do not need your password.
• **Supporter Pool**: Your account will help fetch national leaderboards if you have supporter.
• **Private**: This process is completely confidential.

rework.err_no_map_history: ❌ No beatmap found in the channel history and no valid ID was specified.
rework.err_failed_play: ❌ Cannot calculate rework on a failed play.

Please be patient, it will update soon on pp.huismetbenen.nl.

We have added them to the recalculation queue. Try again in a few minutes.

entre.title: Stats Comparison
entre.err_usage: Correct usage: `s.entre [player1] [player2]`. If you only specify one player, you will be compared (you must be linked).
entre.err_not_linked: Discord user <@{id}> is not linked to Sengo.

render.queued_desc: The replay has been successfully sent to o!rdr and is in the queue.
render.done_desc: The rendering of your play has completed successfully!
render.error_desc: An issue occurred while rendering your play:
render.err_no_attachment: Please attach an `.osr` replay file or reply to a message containing one.
render.err_only_std: This replay is not an osu!standard replay. o!rdr and Sengo only support standard mode.
render.err_too_many_requests: You have exceeded the o!rdr rate limit (429 Too Many Requests). Please wait a few minutes or use a valid API key.
render.err_cooldown: You must wait until {time} before requesting another render.
render.err_fetch_replay: Could not retrieve the replay for this play from osu! servers (this is common for plays that are not in the map's Top 100 or if they are very old/failed).
render.no_preset_found:
You do not have any preset linked to your Discord ID on o!rdr.

🔗 If you wish to configure or change your rendering preferences (skin, resolution, volume, etc.), do so from the o!rdr website by logging in with your Discord:
https://ordr.issou.best/
render.err_config_fetch: An error occurred while trying to query your preset on o!rdr.
render.dev_mode_preset_warning: ⚠️ **Developer mode active**: The bot is using simulated test data because it doesn't have an authorized o!rdr API key configured. Therefore, your real configuration cannot be queried.
render.config_desc:
You have a preset linked to your Discord account on o!rdr.

**Preset Name**: `{name}`
**Last Update**: `{lastSaved}`
render.config_how_to_change:
🔗 **Want to change your configuration?**
For security reasons, you must do so from the official o!rdr page by logging in with Discord and saving your changes there:
https://ordr.issou.best/

errors.1: Emergency stop (manually triggered by o!rdr administrators).
errors.2: Error parsing/processing the replay. Make sure it is not corrupted.
errors.3: Error downloading the replay from o!rdr servers (may be due to invalid characters).
errors.4: All beatmap mirrors are currently down or unavailable.
errors.6: Invalid game mode. o!rdr and Sengo only support osu!standard (standard mode).
errors.7: The replay contains no keypress or movement input data.
errors.8: The beatmap does not exist on osu! servers (custom difficulty or not submitted).
errors.9: Audio for this map is unavailable due to copyright claims.
errors.10: Could not connect to the osu! API.
errors.11: The replay uses the Autoplay mod, which is not allowed.
errors.12: The replay username contains invalid characters.
errors.13: The beatmap is longer than 15 minutes, exceeding the render limit.
errors.14: This player is banned from using o!rdr.
errors.15: Beatmap not found on any of the beatmap mirrors.
errors.16: This IP address is banned from o!rdr.
errors.17: This username is banned from o!rdr.
errors.18: Unknown internal error from the renderer.
errors.19: The renderer could not download the beatmap.
errors.20: The beatmap version on the mirror does not match the replay version.
errors.21: The replay is corrupted and cannot be processed by the renderer.
errors.22: Server-side issue occurred while finalizing the generated video.
errors.23: Server-side issue occurred while preparing the render configuration.
errors.24: The selected beatmap has no name.
errors.25: The replay is missing input data.
errors.26: The replay has incompatible mods combined.
errors.27: Renderer client issue (possible network instability or concurrent renders).
errors.28: The renderer client could not download your replay.
errors.29: This replay is already rendering or in the queue.
errors.30: The beatmap star rating is greater than 20⭐, exceeding the limit.
errors.31: The mapper is blacklisted on o!rdr.
errors.32: This beatmapset is blacklisted on o!rdr.
errors.33: This replay has already errored less than an hour ago.
errors.34: Invalid replay URL or cannot download the replay.
errors.35: A required field is missing from the render request.
errors.36: Your recent requests have a too high error rate.
errors.38: The specified skin does not exist on o!rdr.
errors.39: The custom skin does not exist or has been deleted from o!rdr.
errors.40: o!rdr is not accepting render jobs at the moment.
errors.41: o!rdr is only accepting render jobs from authenticated users at the moment.
errors.42: The replay accuracy is too low to be processed without authentication.
errors.43: This osu! score does not exist.
errors.44: The replay file for this score is not available.
errors.47: You do not have permission to use motion blur.
errors.48: You do not have permission to set the resolution to 1080p.
errors.49: You do not have permission to change the music pitch.
errors.50: This replay has incompatible mods selected or was tampered with.

blacklist.user_blacklisted: ❌ You are not allowed to use Sengo or execute this command because you are in the blacklist.
blacklist.err_only_admin: ❌ This command is reserved for bot administrators.
blacklist.invalid_action:
❌ Invalid action. Correct usage:
> `.blacklist -add <discordId>` (general block)
> `.blacklist -add <discordId> <commands>` (specific command block)
> `.blacklist -remove <discordId>` (remove from blacklist)
> `.blacklist -lista` (list blacklisted users)
blacklist.err_no_user: ❌ Specify a valid Discord ID to add or remove from the blacklist.
blacklist.add_success: ✅ User <@{userId}> (`{userId}`) has been added to Sengo's general blacklist.
blacklist.add_commands_success: ✅ User <@{userId}> (`{userId}`) has been added to Sengo's blacklist for commands: {commands}.
blacklist.remove_success: ✅ User <@{userId}> (`{userId}`) has been removed from Sengo's blacklist.
blacklist.title: 🖤 Sengo Blacklist

track.only_guild: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
track.err_admin_only: ❌ You do not have permissions to use this command (Administrator required).
track.help_desc:
Configure automatic tracking of plays for users in this server.

**Available subcommands:**
• `{prefix}track canal [#channel/desactivar]` : Configures or disables the play announcement channel.
• `{prefix}track add <user>` : Adds an osu! user to tracking.
• `{prefix}track remove <user>` : Removes an osu! user from tracking.
• `{prefix}track list` : Shows the list of tracked users in this server.
track.channel_current: 📢 The current play announcement channel is <#{channelId}>. You can change it with `{prefix}track canal #channel` or disable it with `{prefix}track canal desactivar`.
track.channel_none: 📢 There is no play announcement channel currently configured in this server. Use `{prefix}track canal #channel` to set one.
track.channel_disable_success: ✅ Play announcement channel has been disabled. Sengo will no longer announce new plays in this server.
track.channel_invalid: ❌ You must mention a valid channel (e.g. `#announcements`) or provide its ID.
track.channel_not_text: ❌ That text channel was not found in this server. Make sure Sengo has access to it.
track.channel_success: ✅ The play announcement channel has been successfully set to <#{channelId}>.
track.add_no_channel: ❌ There is no announcement channel configured in this server. Use `{prefix}track canal #channel` first.
track.add_not_found: ❌ The user `{username}` could not be found on osu!
track.add_success_desc:
The osu! user **[{osuUsername}](https://osu.ppy.sh/users/{osuId})** {userMention} is now being tracked in this server.
New plays in their Top 100 will be announced in <#{channelId}>.
track.remove_not_found: ❌ The user `{username}` is not being tracked in this server.
track.remove_success_desc: The osu! user **[{osuUsername}](https://osu.ppy.sh/users/{osuId})** has been removed from tracking in this server.
track.list_empty: ✨ No users are currently being tracked in this server. Use `{prefix}track add <user>` to start.
track.channel_not_found: ❌ The configured tracking channel no longer exists or I don't have access to it.
